flags.message: This petition is almost certainly being held for Beaird v. United States, No. 25-5343 (cert granted 2026-04-20 on the identical question presented; Poore's conference distributions stopped at the 2026-04-17 conference). Expect no disposition until Beaird is decided (~June 2027), so this event will likely stay open for about a year, and its eventual resolution is most plausibly a GVR — which the pipeline's cert-signal labeler codes as 'granted'.
